title: heliophila zeyheri
intro: Heliophila zeyheri, also known as the Cape yellow-flower or Zeyher's heliophila, is a small, annual plant species native to the southern parts of Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Heliophila zeyheri include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in reducing pain and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Heliophila zeyheri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory conditions.
